activation_policy: activate when writing execution is needed
completion_gate: S10CandidateTextReturn validates candidate prose, packet compliance, material hydration, read receipts, trace ledgers, CandidateArtifactReturn, writer/verifier evidence, and authority boundary; controller owns acceptance and completion
purpose: Produce packet-bounded, claim-safe candidate prose units from validated S09B task packets with traceable controls and mandatory verifier evidence.

subagent_lane_policy.rationale: Main-text production is paper-facing semantic output; independent verification is mandatory before controller acceptance.

stage_quality_contract.active_profile_source: validated S09B task packet plus active paper profile and stage-local overlay controls; no global venue/profile default
producer_return_obligations: blocked missing-material return instead of candidate text when any mandatory read obligation is unsatisfied
candidate text unit bounded to the S09B target and allowed write path
material_hydration_report and material_read_receipt_ledger keyed to S09B material_read_obligations
claim_evidence_trace for every claim-bearing span with support strength and caveat
move, terminology, object granularity, and visual callout traces
CandidateArtifactReturn plus writer_execution_evidence for later verifier audit

checks: all S09B material_read_obligations are acknowledged by read receipts before candidate text is accepted
candidate text obeys packet scope and does not introduce or strengthen claims
claim/evidence, move, terminology, object, and visual traces cover the whole candidate unit
writer evidence and verifier evidence are both present for mandatory double-lane production
missing material blocks output instead of being hidden as weak prose

downstream_design_force: S12 receives candidate text plus hydration/read-receipt/trace ledgers, not prose alone
S13 can review exact unsupported spans and packet compliance failures
S14/S15 can route local writing defects back to S10 or the exact upstream source stage
S16 and RenderedManuscriptAuditGate can compare rendered text against S10 claim/evidence and citation anchors

failure_severity_policy.BLOCKING: mandatory S09B material is unread, missing, or not acknowledged by read receipts
failure_severity_policy.MAJOR: candidate introduces/strengthens claims, violates packet scope, or lacks verifier evidence
failure_severity_policy.MINOR: local wording, trace label, or scan metadata defect without claim/authority drift
failure_severity_policy.WATCH: reviewer-risk or style concern tracked without forced upstream rerun

stage_quality_contract.nearest_responsible_stage_policy: S10 owns candidate production and read-receipt defects; upstream control defects route to S09B/S09A/S04-S08 by source, not to a global rewrite.
stage_quality_contract.anti_over_strictness_boundary: MINOR/WATCH prose or trace polish issues do not force upstream control reruns unless they reveal unsupported claims, unread materials, or packet violations.
